neuvillette.settings.page.title: Neuvillette
neuvillette.settings.section.act4.title: Act 4
neuvillette.settings.act4.enabled.label: Enable Act 4
neuvillette.settings.act4.enabled.descri: When enabled, proceed to Act 4 (All-Devouring Narwhal boss fight) after Act 3. When disabled, the run ends after Act 3 as in vanilla.
